text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! ...Ooh, my legs are feeling the<n>burn.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Oguri's unstoppable... How canshe dash straight to the cafeteria likethat after running long-distance?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wait... yeah, chin up, Chiyono O! "Spring<n>comes
again for winter flower buds"!<n>Flowers that bear
the winter will live to<n>blossom in spring!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'm gonna take it easy and use the<n>day to
do some thorough stretches and<n>reflection! Never
give up, Chiyono O!
